OperationNote.Para: When using reverse thrust, pull the reverser levers up to the normal interlock position and apply reverse thrust as required when the operative interlock releases.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative not released provided appropriate performance adjustments are applied.

Note.Para: Use Boeing Onboard Performance Tool (OPT) to determine take-off weight and/or landing weight as it affects aircraft performance.
After engine start, the ENG REV LIMITED L or R advisory message may be displayed for the associated engine.
When using reverse thrust, pull the reverse levers up to the normal interlock position and maintain idle reverse, unless asymmetric reverse thrust is required.

OperationProcedure.Para: For a wet or contaminated runway, apply the performance adjustments for one thrust reverser inoperative.
